'''E2-I6''' [[Droid/Legends|droids]] were instructional droids used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] to assist in training [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] recruits such as those trained on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sirpar/Legends|Sirpar]].<ref name="J2" /> The droids were also deployed at the [[Vernet Imperial Army Training Camp]].<ref name="J15">{{JournalCite|15|The Draw}}</ref>

{{Droid-stub}}

*{{JournalCite|2|You're in the Army Now!|reprint=1}}
*{{JournalCite|15|The Draw}} {{C|Vernet Imperial Army Training Camp}}
